extraction.one_line_summary: KŘÍŽEK Michal took stage in late drag race against Valverde after Sky-led attrition shed early favorites on final climb
tactical_patterns: Sky isolated contenders through sustained climbing pace despite no GC leader, revealing team can control without Froome.
Valverde initiated pace-making but positioned Křížek perfectly by leading out from 500m, tactical error against fresher legs.
Quick-step launched speculative attack at 1300m causing hesitation between Křížek/Valverde, nearly stealing stage through psychological gap.

rider_signals.OLIVEIRA Nelson: neutral: rode aggressively in polka dots but no stage threat, positioning for KOM points not GC
rider_signals.GONÇALVES José: negative: cramped and abandoned chase early in moderate heat, conditioning concerns for mountain stages ahead
rider_signals.DEGENBACHER Thomas: negative: dropped on final climb despite proven Grand Tour breakaway pedigree, form question for week 1
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: negative: controlled final kilometer but lacked punch in last 200m against younger rider, possible early-race fatigue
